ft6336u_init.message0: Initialize FT6336U %1 RST pin %2 INT pin %3
ft6336u_init.tooltip: Create and initialize the FT6336U capacitive touch controller on the default Wire bus

ft6336u_init_with_pins.message0: Initialize FT6336U %1 SDA %2 SCL %3 RST pin %4 INT pin %5
ft6336u_init_with_pins.tooltip: Initialize FT6336U with custom SDA/SCL pins; unsupported boards fall back to the default Wire bus

ft6336u_touch_count.tooltip: Read the number of currently detected touch points

ft6336u_read_gesture.tooltip: Read the raw FT6336U gesture ID

ft6336u_read_touch.tooltip: Read coordinates, event, ID, weight, or misc register for the selected touch point

ft6336u_scan.message0: FT6336U %1 scan and update touch cache
ft6336u_scan.tooltip: Call scan() for multi-touch data and store the result in this object's cache variable

ft6336u_scan_touch_count.tooltip: Read the touch count saved by the most recent scan()

ft6336u_scan_point.tooltip: Read the status or coordinates of a point from the most recent scan() cache

ft6336u_scan_point_pressed.tooltip: Check whether the cached point is in touch or stream status

ft6336u_set_ctrl_mode.tooltip: Set the control mode that decides monitor mode behavior

ft6336u_set_g_mode.tooltip: Set the FT6336U G_MODE interrupt output mode

ft6336u_read_mode_param.tooltip: Read an FT6336U mode parameter register

ft6336u_read_gesture_param.tooltip: Read an FT6336U gesture recognition parameter

ft6336u_write_gesture_param.tooltip: Write an FT6336U gesture recognition parameter

ft6336u_read_system_info.tooltip: Read FT6336U system and version information
